NICOLE M. SOLTANZADEH FROM STEVEN ADAIR MACDONALD & ASSOCIATES PC, 956-6488, APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF AND RESPONDING PARTY

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS NICOLE BALLARD and STEPHON ARRINGTON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled WITH 5 days to answer. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Lisa Schwam, CSR #8994
